comment.body: Indeed, the Emiratis have been quite consistently siding with the US, particularly the Trump administration. They (esp. Dubai) were the first Gulf nation to seek diversification away from petroleum; nowadays they are aggressively pursuing science and tech. They are close to Trump/Republican US because of containment of Iran, and "Arab Spring" paranoia. The UAE also led the Abrahamic Accord in Trump's first term.
